title: Roasted Beetroot and Tenderloin
description: A classic dish combining the sweet flavors of beetroot with the savory taste of tenderloin. Perfect for a special occasion or dinner party.
instructions: Season the tenderloin steak with salt and pepper.
In a large bowl, toss the beetroot with olive oil, roast garlic, and thyme until they are evenly coated.
Spread the beetroot mixture on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
Meanwhile, sear the tenderloin steak in a hot skillet over medium-high heat for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until the tenderloin reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the tenderloin from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced tenderloin with the roasted beetroot and top with diced Canadian bacon.
Optional: Garnish with fresh thyme and serve with your choice of sides.
